name: Add MIT LICENSE file and README badges
theme: Add missing MIT LICENSE file referenced in README.md and add appropriate badges/labels to README.md

criteria.description: A LICENSE file exists at the repository root containing a valid MIT license
testSteps: Verify a file named LICENSE exists at the repository root
Verify the file contains the standard MIT license text
Verify it includes a copyright line with a year
criteria.threshold: LICENSE file exists with valid MIT license text

criteria.description: The README.md LICENSE link correctly resolves to the LICENSE file
testSteps: Find the license reference in README.md
Verify the link [LICENSE](LICENSE) points to the existing LICENSE file
Verify the license section text accurately describes MIT license
criteria.threshold: README license link resolves to the actual LICENSE file

criteria.description: README.md includes appropriate badges/labels near the top (license badge at minimum, plus other relevant badges)
testSteps: Check the top of README.md for badge images
Verify a license badge is present showing MIT
Verify other appropriate badges are present (e.g., vanilla JS, no dependencies, HTML5 Canvas)
Verify badges use standard shield.io or similar format
criteria.threshold: README has license badge and at least 2 other relevant badges near the top

criteria.description: The game still loads and runs without errors after changes
testSteps: Verify the canvas element exists and renders content
Verify no JavaScript errors in the console
criteria.threshold: Game loads and renders without JS errors
